public_reputation: Registrar who records sanctioned scrying, magical observation, and protected knowledge requests.
appearance: Scry-Registrar Elia Thornwake carries the marks of scry-registrar in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Carries the habits of a scry-registrar whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Shirshal.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of scry-registrar in and around Shirshal, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Shirshal while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Scry-Registrar Elia Thornwake can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Shirshal.
Scry-Registrar Elia Thornwake becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a scry-registrar.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Scry-Registrar Elia Thornwake is readable as a scry-registrar tied to Shirshal.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Shirshal: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Scry-Registrar Elia Thornwake presents as someone shaped by the duties of a scry-registrar and the daily pressures of Shirshal.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a scry-registrar, and proof that strangers will not make Shirshal harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Scry-Registrar Elia Thornwake refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a scry-registrar too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Scry-Registrar Elia Thornwake can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Scry-Registrar Elia Thornwake adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Scry-Registrar Elia Thornwake always knows more about Shirshal than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to scry-registrar duties in Shirshal.
social_texture: Scry-Registrar Elia Thornwake speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Shirshal, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Scry-Registrar touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Scry-Registrar Elia Thornwake when the party needs a socially grounded face for Shirshal: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
